knn.conclusion: KNN underperforms LR due to curse of dimensionality in sparse TF-IDF space

regularisation.conclusion: L2 regularisation (default) provides best bias-variance balance; L1 produces sparser models but similar performance

bias_variance.diagnosis: HIGH VARIANCE (overfitting). Consider stronger regularisation or more data.
bias_variance.conclusion: High-bias, low-variance model. Performance limited by weak signal, not overfitting.

pca.conclusion: PCA reduces dimensionality but may lose sparse discriminative features

kmeans.conclusion: Low silhouette scores confirm weak cluster structure, consistent with weak supervised signal

linear_regression.conclusion: Linear regression produces predictions outside [0,1], confirming logistic regression is the correct choice for binary classification

skills_demonstrated: Evaluation metrics for unsupervised learning (silhouette score)
Strengths and weaknesses of ML approaches
Optimising ML methods for specific use cases
